rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies the generality failures (general monoidal/antipode facts hidden as `private` in a base-change file; `@[simp]` lemmas that are strict special cases of existing Mathlib lemmas) and diagnoses them accurately. Review 1 mischaracterizes `BaseChange.map_comp`/`map_id` as re-proving when they already delegate to the private helpers, making its primary fix advice misleading or moot.
